title: Amethyst is goated
description: Amethyst optimization modpack – the GOAT! Always up to date
body:
### AngelAuraMC's Amethyst is the GOAT!
You can play Minecraft on your portable device. And this modpack is what'll help you get a comfortable 60 FPS. **Make sure to enable "Run sodium forcefully" (Settings > Experimental Stuff) — otherwise it will crash!**

### What's inside?
The modpack contains only client-side mods. Its goal is to improve the multiplayer experience for players, not singleplayer. It's Fabric-only, hand-picked best-of-the-best optimization mods — no questionable (hi, ModernFix!) or useless stuff (Simple Voice Chat technically optional, but you'll want it). Plus 3 killer resource packs worth trying **(2 light ones need server rejoin).** Check the mod list in Dependencies (latest version)

### Why the project even exists?
The project originally started as a way to save my time when I'm helping peeps get THE REAL Minecraft experience on their portable devices. But popular optimization packs force-feed Fabric Multiplayer enjoyers garbage like ModernFix & ServerCore, or lack essential ones like ScalableLux & C2ME - this modpack fixes that

### Important note
Even though this modpack was originally created to optimize Amethyst, it is fully compatible with all Minecraft launchers, so you can use it, for example, on a low‑end laptop

### Deep into custom controls?
[**Check out**](https://www.mediafire.com/folder/pv1bfuwo3jp47/controls) my setup example:
![Here how it looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eac9c3681021a00f2f24eb62c135fd5ae5b2ea7e_0.webp)
